title: Plugins
subtitle: Manage discovered Codex and OpenCode plugins and control which skills are available to agents.
pluginsEnabledDesc: {{count}} plugin(s) active. Skills from plugins are visible to agents.
pluginsDisabledDesc: Plugin support is disabled. No plugin skills will be loaded.
noPluginsFound: No plugins found. Install Codex or OpenCode plugins into ~/.agents/plugins/ or the workspace .agents/plugins/ directory.
